languages.text: "Твой эксперимент — мерзость, причиняющая людям страдания. Я требую его прекращения".
"Your experiment is an abomination of human suffering. I demand that it be stopped."
languages.original_text: "Твой эксперимент — мерзость, причиняющая людям страдания. Я требую его прекращения".

traits.locale_text: "Your experiment is an abomination of human suffering. I demand that it be stopped."
"Your experiment is an abomination of human suffering. I demand that it be stopped."
"Your experiment is an abomination of human suffering. I demand that it be stopped."

languages.text: 「あなたの実験は人間の苦痛を冒涜する行為だ。それを止めることを要求する」
languages.original_text: "Your experiment is an abomination of human suffering. I demand that it be stopped."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの実験は人間の苦痛を冒涜する行為だ。それを止めることを要求する。」

languages.text: “你的实验是对人类苦难的亵渎。我要求你立刻停止。”
languages.original_text: "Your experiment is an abomination of human suffering. I demand that it be stopped."

traits.locale_text: “你的实验是对人类苦难的亵渎。我要求你立刻停止。”

languages.text: «Su experimento es un abominable monumento al sufrimiento humano. Le ordeno que le ponga fin».
languages.original_text: "Your experiment is an abomination of human suffering. I demand that it be stopped."

traits.locale_text: «Su experimento es un abominable monumento al sufrimiento humano. Le ordeno que le ponga fin».

languages.text: "Euer Experiment basiert auf abscheuliche Weise auf menschlichem Leid. Ich verlange, dass Ihr es umgehend beendet."
languages.original_text: "Your experiment is an abomination of human suffering. I demand that it be stopped."

traits.locale_text: "Euer Experiment basiert auf abscheuliche Weise auf menschlichem Leid. Ich verlange, dass Ihr es umgehend beendet."

languages.text: « Votre expérience est une abomination de souffrance humaine. J'exige que vous y mettiez fin. »
languages.original_text: "Your experiment is an abomination of human suffering. I demand that it be stopped."

traits.locale_text: « Votre expérience est une abomination de souffrance humaine. J'exige que vous y mettiez fin. »

languages.text: "Deney, insan acısının iğrenç bir hâli. Durdurulmasını talep ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "Your experiment is an abomination of human suffering. I demand that it be stopped."

traits.locale_text: "Deney, insan acısının iğrenç bir hâli. Durdurulmasını talep ediyorum."
